generation_notes.seamless: All layers must tile horizontally. Verify with 2x width preview.
generation_notes.alpha: Far/Mid/Near layers need transparent regions — use alpha channel, not solid backgrounds.
generation_notes.time_variants: Use img2img from day variant as base, shift palette via color_correct tool.
generation_notes.parallax_test: Stack all 4 layers in test viewer to verify depth consistency.
